title: Your manager cannot read your stack trace
hook: If you only report that you are busy, your manager has no way to help with the actual failure mode.

blocks.html: Managers hear "busy" from everyone. Useful context sounds more like: this decision is blocked, this project has hidden risk, this scope no longer fits, or this work is draining the wrong battery.

blocks.title: 1:1 · better signal
blocks.caption: The useful signal is usually already there.

lines.t: yes: API decision is blocking mobile by Friday
ask: can you align product and platform today?

beats.heading: Bring the ask with the problem

blocks.html: Say what is happening, why it matters, what you tried, and what help would change the outcome. That lets your manager use their different tools.

blocks.code:
Risk: checkout migration misses beta date
Cause: product copy not approved
Tried: async thread, design review
Ask: decision owner by Wednesday
blocks.caption: A clear ask is easier to act on than a weather report.

blocks.html: Escalation is not failure. It is routing a problem to the level where it can be solved before it becomes drama.
Your manager does not need every detail. They need the shape of the problem and the lever only they can pull.
